results.hypothesis: The kids look so cute, Mel! I bet they bring lots of joy. How did they handle the accident?
The kids look so cute, Mel! I bet they bring lots of joy. How did they handle the accident?
Wow, Caroline! What kinda jobs are you thinkin' of? Anything that stands out?

Way to go, Jon! Don't quit, remember, failures lead you closer to success. Here's a pic from when I was dancing - it was a tough road, but it was worth it!

Hey Gina, how's it going?

A car ran a red light and hit us, but thankfully everyone is okay. Besides that, my cousin just had a tough time recently, so I'm lending a hand in helping her find a new place.

My colleagues and I went to a convention together last month. We're all passionate about using tech for good in our community. It was great to connect with like-minded folks and swap ideas. It's inspiring to see people united in their goal.

Hey Nate, long time no see! The screenplay I sent in to the film festival has been on my mind all day everyday. I keep bouncing between crazy emotions like relief, excitement and worry! Fingers crossed a producer or director falls in love with it and it ends up on the big screen - that would be awesome!
No worries, Joanna. Hope you enjoy it!
No worries, Nate! Glad to hear it. What flavor did you make?
Thanks, Joanna! Your support means a lot to me. That road trip sounds great! Where did you go? Did you discover any interesting places?

Hey Joanna, I'm no writer like you, but something pretty awesome happened. Last Monday I got to teach people vegan ice cream recipes on my own cooking show! It was a bit nerve-wracking to put myself out there, but it was a blast. Plus, I picked up a few new recipes!
Way to go, Nate! Congrats on the cooking show, I'll definitely be tuning in! What's your favorite dish from the show?

Wow Joanna, that must have been so exciting! It's incredible when you get those moments of joy. Anyway, I took my turtles to the beach in Tampa yesterday! They always bring me peace in the craziness of life.
No worries, Nate! Glad to hear it. What flavor did you make?
Hey Nate, my favorite dairy-free treat is this amazing chocolate raspberry tart. It has an almond flour crust, chocolate ganache, and fresh raspberries - it's delicious!
